title: Rayher 66048000 DIY Dream Catcher Craft Kit with Three Metal Hoops, Wall Hanging in Aqua, Pink and Mint Pastel Colours, Length 41 cm
features: The kit comes with all materials you need to build a lovely dreamcatcher: 3 metal hoops (large, medium, small), 16 beads, 20 feathers, 3 leatherette ribbons in the sizes 100 cm/90 cm/50 cm, Yarn in pastel shades with a length of 3.50 m each, 1 plastic needle

The set is suitable for crafters at all levels. Simply follow the step-by-step instruction to assemble your unique piece. The intricately woven web and the colourful details make this protective talisman a stunning eyecatcher for your bedroom

A fun craft activity for a birthday party. Kids and Teens can unleash their creativity by building and decorating the bohemian style wall art. You can provide additional craft materials like ribbons, tassels, glitter glue and charms for even more crafting fun
The wall hanging makes a wonderful gift for a crafty loved one. Use this craft set as filler for favour or party bags to treat your guests with something special
One pack contains crafting materials for one dreamcatcher; Length: 41 cm; Width: 14 cm
description: From the manufacturer Rayher. Just create. At Rayher, you can find everything that makes you creative. DIY fans will find a huge selection of articles and product ideas for creative design, handicrafts and handicrafts in the Rayher range. The extensive assortment ranges from papers, stamps, inks, casting and modelling products to jewellery, children's products and accessories, as well as seasonal and festive craft and decorative articles. With over 20,000 products, the choice is huge and the quality is outstanding. So everyone - whether creative beginners, hobbyists or DIY professionals - can find the materials they want as well as the right tools and equipment. Searching for ideas? On our website there are detailed instructions for more than 400 craft ideas on various creative topics and craft techniques to get started immediately. So you can always look for inspiration for individual creations or recreate our ideas. And with the filter options by topic, technique, production time and degree of difficulty, you can easily and quickly find a suitable craft tip. True to our motto: Being creative makes you happy. We have everything that makes you creative.
